title: Document Review Findings
description: Structured output schema for document review reviewer passes

reviewer.description: Reviewer name that produced this output

findings.description: List of review findings. Empty array if no issues found.

section.description: Document section where the issue appears

why_it_matters.description: Impact statement describing what goes wrong if the issue is not addressed

autofix_class.description: Whether the issue has one clear correct fix or requires judgment

finding_type.description: Whether the document says something wrong or forgot to say something needed

suggested_fix.description: Concrete fix text. Required in practice for auto findings.

confidence.description: Reviewer confidence in this finding before global calibration

impact_score.description: Value recovered by fixing the issue

effort_to_fix.description: Estimated effort required to address the issue in the document

evidence.description: Quoted text from the document that supports this finding

residual_risks.description: Risks the reviewer noticed but could not confirm strongly enough as findings

deferred_questions.description: Questions that should be resolved in a later workflow stage
